title: Assign a person completeing an action to a specific item
excerpt: for example, if person x changes status item to ‘working on it’ then a column called ‘requested by’ will be assigned to person x automatically.

posts.author: TomSigron (Tom Sigron)
posts.cookedHtml: for example, if person x changes status item to ‘working on it’ then a column called ‘requested by’ will be assigned to person x automatically.

posts.cookedHtml:
